summary: Backend-only verification completed for P0 wh_5a terminal completion and natural-language report intent detection fix. All 225 tests pass across 13 targeted test files. The fix correctly: (1) stops diagnostic progression after repair-complete messages from wh_5a (no wh_5b leak), (2) detects natural-language report commands in RU/EN/ES and transitions to final_report mode, (3) preserves clarification behavior at wh_5/wh_5a.
critical_code_review_comments: Natural-language report patterns correctly added in prompt-composer.ts:128-132 covering EN (write/generate report), RU (напиши/сформируй отчет), ES (genera/crear reporte)
detectModeCommand now checks explicit aliases first, then natural-language patterns - safe fallback order
Route procedure-context suppression (route.ts:452-462) correctly prevents wh_5b injection when isolationComplete=true or terminalState.phase!='normal'
P1.7 terminal enforcement (route.ts:427-440) clears activeStepId after all step-assignment code paths, ensuring no step leak
New route tests verify: terminal completion stops progression, RU report request transitions mode, EN report request transitions mode, clarification preserves step
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 wh_5a terminal completion and natural-language report intent detection verified. Key behaviors: (1) After repair-complete message at wh_5a (e.g., 'предохранитель не работает. Я заменил, водонагреватель заработал'), activeStepId becomes null, isolationComplete=true, terminalState.phase='terminal', and procedureContext is suppressed - no wh_5b appears. (2) Natural-language report commands like 'Напиши Report', 'Write report', 'Generate report' now trigger final_report mode transition via detectModeCommand. (3) Clarification requests at wh_5/wh_5a still preserve the current step without completing it.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: (1) Natural-language report requests like 'Напиши Report' were not recognized because detectModeCommand only checked exact alias matches, not natural-language patterns. Fix: Added FINAL_REPORT_NATURAL_LANGUAGE_PATTERNS regex array covering EN/RU/ES report commands. (2) After repair-complete message set terminal/isolation state, the route's procedureContext fallback could still inject branch/main diagnostic steps (wh_5b). Fix: Added shouldSuppressProcedureContext check that sets procedureContext='' when isolationComplete=true or terminalState.phase!='normal'.
